---
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    anchor-location: none
    page-layout: full
echo: false
message: false
warning: false
---

```{=html}
<main class="ed">

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-hero-row">
      <div>
        <p class="l-eyebrow">Brian Cervantes Alvarez</p>
        <h1>Statistician and data scientist building tools people actually use.</h1>
        <p class="l-lede">
          I design explainable models, ship interactive analytics, and teach the
          ideas behind them so adoption sticks. R, Python, SQL, Shiny — and a bias
          toward clear answers over clever methods.
        </p>
        <div class="l-cta-row">
          <a href="#contact" class="l-btn" aria-label="Contact Brian">Get in touch</a>
          <a href="#work" class="l-btn l-btn--ghost">See selected work</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img src="/assets/images/profile2.JPG" alt="Portrait of Brian Cervantes Alvarez"
           class="l-portrait" loading="eager">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Selected Work -->
<section class="l-section first" id="work">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Selected work</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Projects worth a closer look</h2>
      <a href="/content/projects/">All projects →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/united-kingdom-car-accident-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/ukCarAccident.webp" alt="UK Car Accident Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Shiny · Analytics app</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">UK Traffic Accident Trends</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            An interactive dashboard for exploring UK incident patterns —
            filters, dynamic views, defaults that surface signal first.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/wine-multivariate-statistical-analysis/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/redwhite.jpeg" alt="Wine Multivariate Analysis">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Statistical modeling</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Multivariate Analysis: Wine Quality</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            PCA and supervised models with diagnostics to separate signal from
            noise across correlated chemical features.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/yelp-business-reviews-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/yelpBurst.svg" alt="Yelp Business Reviews Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Shiny · Geospatial</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Yelp Business Reviews</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            A spatial review explorer with map-linked filters, density layers,
            and per-business summaries.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Writing -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Writing</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Recent post</h2>
      <a href="/content/blog/">All posts →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/blog/interactive-teaching-with-webr/" style="grid-column: span 1;">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/webR.png" alt="Interactive Teaching with webR">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Teaching · webR</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Interactive Teaching with webR</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            Browser-native, no-install R lessons built with Quarto and webR so
            students can run code inline and learn by doing.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Approach -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">How I work</p>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Decision-focused</h3>
        <p>Translate goals into crisp KPIs and hypotheses. Design analyses that answer "What should we do next?" not just "What happened?"</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Explainable</h3>
        <p>Train and validate with holdout and cross-validation. Prefer interpretable models (GLMs, trees, SHAP-style diagnostics) so stakeholders can trust the output.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Reliable pipelines</h3>
        <p>Auditable R, Python, and SQL pipelines with documented assumptions, reproducible runs, and failure-aware checks.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Production-minded</h3>
        <p>Ship lightweight apps, instrument usage, and iterate on real-world feedback so the work compounds.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Toolkit -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Toolkit</p>
    <h2>Languages, frameworks, and platforms</h2>
    <p class="l-lede">A short list of what I reach for first on real projects.</p>
    <div class="l-chips">
      <span class="l-chip">R / Shiny</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Python</span>
      <span class="l-chip">SQL</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Statistical analysis</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Tidyverse</span>
      <span class="l-chip">scikit-learn</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Quarto</span>
      <span class="l-chip">GCP / AWS</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Consulting</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Contact -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-contact" id="contact">
      <p class="l-eyebrow">Contact</p>
      <h2>Have a data problem worth solving?</h2>
      <p>Send a note with context and timelines and I will reply with a concrete next step.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="justify-content:center;">
        <a class="l-btn" href="mailto:briancervantesalvarez@gmail.com" aria-label="Email Brian">Email me</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="https://linkedin.com/in/bcervantesalvarez" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="l-resume">
      <p><strong>Looking for the full resume?</strong> Download the PDF or open it in a new tab.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="margin:0;">
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/assets/documents/resume/BCA-Resume.pdf" download="Brian-Cervantes-Alvarez-Resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/assets/documents/resume/BCA-Resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Open in new tab</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
